meetings.title: Meetings & Summaries
meetings.mockTranscript: Hello team, today we aligned on the advanced module architecture for Omni-Assistant. The Reminder module will support simulated push notifications, and the Meeting module will record audio and generate structured AI conclusions and action items. We must ensure seamless translations across Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese, and Korean. Please complete the setup and emulator deployment today.
meetings.mockConclusion: Aligned on advanced module architecture and scheduled initialization and deployment for today.
meetings.mockKeypoint1: Reminder module must implement simulated push notifications.
meetings.mockKeypoint2: Meeting module requires a dynamic waveform and structured AI summary layout.
meetings.mockKeypoint3: Both advanced modules need integration with the 4-language i18n switcher.
